message:
Improve date handling and search filtering

Date parsing improvements:
- Use Unix epoch (1970-01-01) as fallback for missing/invalid dates
  instead of Utc::now() which is misleading
- Add epoch_utc() and parse_rfc3339_or_epoch() helper functions
- Apply consistently across storage.rs, search.rs, parser.rs,
  stats_analytics.rs

Search filtering improvements:
- Parse --since/--until dates once upfront instead of per-result
- Use progressive fetch when post-filtering is needed:
  doubles batch size until enough results or all docs fetched
- More efficient for queries with date/reply filters

All tests pass. No behavior change for valid data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,16 @@ const BYTES_PER_KB: u64 = 1024;
 const BYTES_PER_MB: u64 = 1024 * 1024;
 const BYTES_PER_GB: u64 = 1024 * 1024 * 1024;
 
+const fn epoch_utc() -> DateTime<Utc> {
+    DateTime::<Utc>::from_timestamp(0, 0).unwrap()
+}
+
+fn parse_rfc3339_or_epoch(value: Option<String>) -> DateTime<Utc> {
+    value
+        .and_then(|s| DateTime::parse_from_rfc3339(&s).ok())
+        .map_or_else(epoch_utc, |dt| dt.with_timezone(&Utc))
+}
+
 /// `SQLite` storage manager
 pub struct Storage {
     conn: Connection,
@@ -1058,11 +1068,7 @@ impl Storage {
